de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext

Class CcatchReturnValParameterDeclaration

  • java.lang.Object
    • recoder.java.JavaSourceElement
      • recoder.java.JavaProgramElement
        • recoder.java.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.CcatchNonstandardParameterDeclaration
            • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.CcatchReturnValParameterDeclaration
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable, java.lang.Cloneable, NonTerminalProgramElement, ParameterContainer, ProgramElement, SourceElement, StatementContainer, ModelElement

    public class CcatchReturnValParameterDeclaration
extends CcatchNonstandardParameterDeclaration
implements ParameterContainer
    A "\Return" parameter of a ccatch clause.
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

        Parameters:

        Returns:

        Throws:

      • getChildPositionCode

        public int getChildPositionCode(ProgramElement child)

      • replaceChild

        public boolean replaceChild(ProgramElement p,
                            ProgramElement q)
        Replace a single child in the current node. The child to replace is matched by identity and hence must be known exactly. The replacement element can be null - in that case, the child is effectively removed. The parent role of the new child is validated, while the parent link of the replaced child is left untouched.
        Specified by:
        replaceChild in interface NonTerminalProgramElement
        Parameters:
        p - the old child.
        p - the new child.
        Returns:
        true if a replacement has occured, false otherwise.
        Throws:
        java.lang.ClassCastException - if the new child cannot take over the role of the old one.
